message:
Shrink WASM 144KB → 103KB: strip symbols, disable unwind tables

- build.zig: add strip=true and unwind_tables=.none to both
  engine and zimdjson modules
- wasm-opt: add --strip-target-features to remove metadata
- 28% smaller WASM binary with zero functional change
- Total bundle: 103KB WASM + 20KB JS (78KB gzipped npm package)

files.patch:
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
   },
   "scripts": {
     "build:zig": "zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall",
-    "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
+    "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
     "build:types": "bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
     "build:js": "bun build src/js/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external && bun run build:types",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:js",
